Notice And Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JOHN WHEELER's, ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for dismissal of representative action without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
